pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-029 (AI and Machine Learning) scores 0.507 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for Vector Database Engineer: in_scope. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. In-scope domain, score 0.507. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI and Machine Learning KSA AI-K-029 as a discrete competency for Vector Database Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against Vector Database Engineer job posting data. AI content is governance/compliance/executive-communication focused, not engineering-platform scope. Not market-supported as discrete platform engineering competency.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. AI content is governance/compliance/executive-communication focused, not engineering-platform scope. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: No market evidence for this role.
